analysis.summary: Detected 8 anomalies (4 at P1). Recommendations generated from the static knowledge base (LLM disabled).

anomalies.title: High 5xx rate: 220 requests (43%)  (sustained ~420s, 14 windows)
anomalies.detail: 220/507 requests returned 5xx in this window. The incident persisted across 14 windows (~420s).
samples: 2026-06-18T09:13:30.725Z [ERROR] api - unhandled exception in request pipeline method=GET path=/api/policy status=503 duration_ms=1530 trace_id=2df6e9
2026-06-18T09:13:30.731Z [ERROR] payment - payment gateway timeout after 30000ms method=POST path=/api/payment status=502 duration_ms=30000 trace_id=ead25f
2026-06-18T09:13:31.123Z [ERROR] api - unhandled exception in request pipeline method=GET path=/api/policy status=500 duration_ms=952 trace_id=d22f53
anomalies.recommendation: Identify the failing endpoint; if it started right after a deploy -> rollback; check upstream dependency health.
anomalies.root_cause: (LLM off) — see the static recommendation above.

anomalies.title: Error spike: 220 errors in 30s  (sustained ~360s, 12 windows)
anomalies.detail: Errors/window = 220 (baseline median=0.0, robust z=0.0). The incident persisted across 12 windows (~360s).
samples: 2026-06-18T09:13:30.725Z [ERROR] api - unhandled exception in request pipeline method=GET path=/api/policy status=503 duration_ms=1530 trace_id=2df6e9
2026-06-18T09:13:30.731Z [ERROR] payment - payment gateway timeout after 30000ms method=POST path=/api/payment status=502 duration_ms=30000 trace_id=ead25f
2026-06-18T09:13:31.123Z [ERROR] api - unhandled exception in request pipeline method=GET path=/api/policy status=500 duration_ms=952 trace_id=d22f53
anomalies.recommendation: Isolate the service with rising errors; check the latest deploy/release and consider a rollback; inspect downstream logs (DB, gateway).
anomalies.root_cause: (LLM off) — see the static recommendation above.

anomalies.title: OutOfMemory in service 'quote-engine'
anomalies.detail: Detected critical pattern 'OutOfMemory'. This is typically a P1 needing immediate action.
samples: 2026-06-18T09:16:30.000Z [FATAL] quote-engine - java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space trace_id=343663
anomalies.recommendation: Handle as P1 now: for OOM increase heap / find the memory leak; pool exhausted -> raise size / fix connection leaks; controlled restart.
anomalies.root_cause: (LLM off) — see the static recommendation above.

anomalies.title: Service 'policy' stopped logging
anomalies.detail: Service 'policy' logged earlier but went completely silent in the final quarter of the timeline — likely dead/hung.
anomalies.recommendation: Check the service liveness/health; see if it crashed/hung/deadlocked; restart and add an alert for missing logs.
anomalies.root_cause: (LLM off) — see the static recommendation above.

anomalies.title: High latency: p95 = 30000ms  (sustained ~360s, 12 windows)
anomalies.detail: p95 latency = 30000ms (baseline median=104ms, z=5041.3). The incident persisted across 12 windows (~360s).
anomalies.recommendation: Check DB slow queries, connection pool, GC pauses; review CPU/mem dashboards; enable tracing to find the bottleneck.
anomalies.root_cause: (LLM off) — see the static recommendation above.

anomalies.title: New unseen error in 'api'  (sustained ~60s, 2 windows)
anomalies.detail: A new error signature appeared (not in baseline): unhandled exception in request pipeline The incident persisted across 2 windows (~60s).
samples: 2026-06-18T09:13:30.045Z [ERROR] api - unhandled exception in request pipeline method=GET path=/api/policy status=500 duration_ms=1618 trace_id=a5fd1a
anomalies.recommendation: New class of error — assign an owner, open a ticket, check recent code/config changes that introduced this signature.
anomalies.root_cause: (LLM off) — see the static recommendation above.

anomalies.title: Suspected brute-force: 326 x 401/403  (sustained ~180s, 6 windows)
anomalies.detail: 326 auth failures in 30s — possible password-guessing attack. The incident persisted across 6 windows (~180s).
anomalies.recommendation: Enable rate-limiting & lockout on /login; block source IPs at the WAF/firewall; enforce MFA; audit access logs.
anomalies.root_cause: (LLM off) — see the static recommendation above.
